digest.component_or_area: event store reducer / signing (op-cert attestation storage + producer)
propositions: An asymmetric op-cert DSSE envelope must be stored on a ticket by extending the existing SIGNATURE event record rather than introducing a new event type.
The producer signing.sign_opcert_manifest appends a SIGNATURE event carrying the encoded envelope and bound material_fingerprint/merged_log_commit with no HMAC signature.
The reducer process_signature must preserve envelope, material_fingerprint, and merged_log_commit into attestations[kind] and survive a compact-then-replay round-trip unchanged.
opcert.opcert_from_record returns (envelope, bound_fields) for an op-cert record and None for a legacy HMAC record.
The record-schema extension is additive present-only so legacy HMAC sign_manifest records are byte-unchanged and still HMAC-verify.
Op-cert SIGNATURE events are preserved append-only but read as unsigned on pre-upgrade clones lacking the asymmetric verifier, so verify/reconcile hosts must be upgraded first.
